title: SymbolicScar
description: JSON Schema for a Symbolic Scar — a hypervector record minted by the EpistemicEscrow whenever CFDI > threshold. Records are appended to scar_registry.yaml (via PyYAML) and can be ingested by any YAML-aware store.

scar_id.description: Deterministic identifier: SCAR-{payload_hash[:16]}-{date}. Collision-resistant via SHA-256 prefix.

cfdi_result.description: Full CFDIResult serialised as a flat object.

confidence.description: Scalar model confidence at time of evaluation.

fidelity.description: Structural AST fidelity score of the payload.

cfdi.description: Computed CFDI value that triggered escrow.

escrow_triggered.description: Always true when a scar is minted.

payload_hash.description: First 16 hex chars of SHA-256(payload). Non-reversible excerpt for traceability.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the CFDI computation.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value context (e.g., source_file, model_id, prompt_version).

payload_excerpt.description: First 256 characters of the quarantined LLM output. Truncated to protect secrets.

algorithm.description: Denormalized copy of cfdi_result.algorithm for fast querying.

cfdi_value.description: Denormalized copy of cfdi_result.cfdi for fast querying.

threshold.description: The ε value that was active when this scar was minted.

resolution.description: Lifecycle state of the scar. UNRESOLVED: blocking; RESOLVED_MANUAL: human fixed; RESOLVED_REGEN: re-generated and passed gate; FALSE_POSITIVE: analyst confirmed no real risk; SUPPRESSED: permanently bypassed (requires dual approval).

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of scar creation (minting time).
